name: Matt D.
detailed_review:
What do you like best about Synup?

Synup is an extremely easy tool to set up and start getting some quick ROl. Our clients enjoy the straight-forward dashboard where they can get a birds-eye view of the strategy we're going to implement for them. The review management system is superb. Lastly, customer service is excellent.

‍

What do you dislike about Synup?

There's really nothing to dislike. Everything is easy about the tool, and if there's anything challenging, customer service corrects it.

‍

Recommendations to others considering Synup:

Don't be afraid to contact support with questions. They've extremely helpful.

‍

What problems is Synup solving and how is that benefiting you?

The management of clients citations and reviews... and client reporting of said tasks. Everything is extremely streamlined with Synup.
reviewer_details:
Director and Founder

Small-Business (50 or fewer emp.)
